_comment: Audit trail des 20 derniers cycles -- decisions ROLLBACK/PROCEED basees sur donnees objectives.

cycles.summary: T050: anamThisRun added to RunState (resets on startRun, increments alongside meta.anam in addAnam()). RunSummary now shows 'Anam cette quete' vs 'Anam total'. T049: Ogham unlock at faction rep=50 crossing in addReputation() — faction-to-ogham map (druides=coll, anciens=ailm, korrigans=onn, niamh=saille, ankou=eadhadh), fires CustomEvent 'ogham_unlocked', toast in main.ts 3s display at top. T051: 20 landes_bruyere batch3 cards (286 total, 14/20 niamh-heavy, druides=2/20, HEAL<=5). Bundle +1.54KB. TS: 0 errors. New tasks: T052 (OghamPanel locked state), T053 (persist meta to localStorage).

qa_extended.playtester: PASS — T049 unlock guards correct, T050 resets/increments verified, T051 niamh 14/20 cards
qa_extended.visual_qa: PASS — bundle within threshold, no regressions. Screenshots still blocked by CPU guardian (LOW ongoing).

cycles.summary: Implemented runes minigame (ogham pair-matching, canvas-based, 4x4 grid, 15s timer, score 0-100). Added 20 FastRoute card templates for foret_broceliande+druides covering all 8 lexical fields and 5 factions. T001 (blank scenes) investigated but no issue found in code -- marked needs-repro.

Implemented equilibre minigame (balance cursor with wind gusts, 12s timer, score = % time in safe zone). Enhanced HUD with 5 faction reputation bars, anam counter, biome currency display with dynamic label. Added animated fog shader plane to CoastBiome (sin-wave noise, edge fade, time-driven animation). All 3/3 tasks completed. Bundle +1.92%.

Implemented herboristerie minigame (5x4 grid, identify target plant among toxic/safe, 15s timer, score with time bonus + wrong-pick penalty). Added 20 FastRoute cards for cotes_sauvages+niamh (coastal celtic themes: shipwrecks, sea caves, selkies, tidal pools, lighthouses). Added Ogham activation UI panel (slot system showing equipped oghams with cooldown indicators, skip button, shown before each card). 3/3 tasks completed. Bundle +3.62% (636->659 KB), well under 668 KB block threshold.

Implemented negociation minigame (scrolling word-based persuasion targeting faction keywords, combo system, 12s timer, score from faction word picks + combo bonus - neutral penalty + time bonus). Added 20 FastRoute cards for landes_bruyere+anciens (celtic moors themes: tumuli, cairns, stone circles, wild ponies, heather storms, ancient oaths, peat bogs, warrior processions). Wired ogham effect execution into EffectEngine with applyOghamEffect() for immediate effects (heal, currency, sacrifice) and processOghamModifiers() for card effect modifiers (block/cancel negatives, reduce high damage, double positives, invert effects). Game loop updated: ogham effects applied after selection, card effects processed through ogham modifiers, activeOgham cleared after use. 3/3 tasks completed. Bundle +3.64% (659->683 KB), under 692 KB WARN threshold.

Implemented combat_rituel minigame (circular dodge arena with rotating arc obstacles at various radii/speeds, 10s timer, score = survival time % + center bonus zone %). Implemented apaisement minigame (breathing rhythm sync with pulsing circle expand/contract cycle, 12s timer, click at peaks for accuracy, score = avg accuracy * tap count bonus). Added 20 FastRoute cards for villages_celtes+korrigans (market days, blacksmiths, traveling bards, hidden fairy doors, mischievous pranks, secret passages, talking tools, midnight dances, prophetic moss, enchanted mills). All caps respected (rep<=10, heal<=8, dmg<=5). 3/3 tasks completed. Bundle +3.81% (683->709 KB), under 717 KB WARN threshold. 7/14 minigames done. 86 card templates total.

Bundle optimization: Vite manual chunks split 709KB monolith into 3 chunks (three-core 529KB vendor + index 148KB app + minigames 60KB). App code now 208KB (-70.7%). Implemented sang_froid minigame (cursor tracking in progressively shrinking + drifting safe zone, 10s timer, score = % time inside). Implemented course minigame (QTE symbol chase with ogham characters, 8 rounds x 1.5s window, click target among 4 decoys, score = hits/rounds * 100). Added 20 FastRoute cards for cercles_pierres+druides (equinox rituals, ley line convergences, time slips, ogham inscriptions awakening, stargazing druids, sacred geometry, underground chambers, solstice fires, druide singing stones, healing rituals). All caps respected (rep<=10, heal<=8, dmg<=5). 4/4 tasks completed. 9/14 minigames done. 106 card templates total.

Implemented 3 new minigames: fouille (find target object 'Cle Ogham' etc among 15 decoy labels, 4-column grid with jitter, 2s position shuffle, 12s timer, score = 50 base + early find bonus), ombres (stealth corridor with sinusoidal winding path that narrows from 55px to 18px half-width, 40 segments, cursor-driven progress, collision penalty on score, 10s timer), volonte (hold cursor on pulsing center circle r=30 vs flashing colored distractor squares spawning every 0.6s accelerating, max 12 active, 10s timer, score = % time on target). Added 20 FastRoute cards for marais_korrigans+ankou (will-o-wisps, drowned crossroads, ghostly washerwomen/lavandieres, bog bodies, ankou's cart, death omens, spectral processions, ancestor bargains, singing reeds, spectral door to otherworld). All caps respected (rep<=10, heal<=8, dmg<=5). 4/4 tasks completed. 12/14 minigames done. 126 card templates total (106+20). App bundle 242KB (+34KB from card templates), under 280KB WARN. Remaining: regard + echo minigames, collines_dolmens + iles_mystiques card sets.

playtester.verb_field_balance: esprit over-represented (68 uses vs 7 for chance)

visual_qa.hud_verdict: PASS - all elements present and wired
visual_qa.known_blocker: MerlinCabinHub CRITICAL parse error in merlin_cabin_hub.gd

cycles.summary: FINAL CONTENT CYCLE. Implemented last 2 minigames: regard (memory sequence — show 4-6 ogham symbols for 3s with numbered order indicators, hide, player clicks from shuffled 5x3 grid in correct order, 3 rounds increasing length 4/5/6, score = correct/total symbols * 100) and echo (visual sound direction — celtic symbol flashes briefly in 1 of 4 quadrants N/E/S/W with glow effect, then vanishes, player clicks correct quadrant, 6 rounds, 1.2s answer window, ripple click feedback, score = hits/rounds * 100). Added 40 FastRoute card templates: 20 for collines_dolmens (passage tombs at dawn, burial mound guardians, ancestor visions, cairn oaths, hilltop fires, source sacree, spectral berger, champ de pierres tombales, ogham bridge, chained dolmen) and 20 for iles_mystiques (Avalon mists, faery ferryman, silver apple orchard, frozen time, selkie pelts, underwater path, glastonbury thorn, basalt grotto, glass tower, sea horses, underwater garden, Morgane's chalice, Tir na nOg portal, translucent birds, coral fountain, ghost ship, distant golden isle, galaxy-eyed seal guardian, final Avalon). ALL content milestones reached: 14/14 minigames, 166 card templates, 9 biomes. Effect caps: rep<=10, heal<=7, dmg<=5 all respected. Field quotas met per batch. Faction rebalancing: druides capped at 4/20 in collines, niamh boosted to 14/20 rep options in iles (addressing cycle 7 imbalance warning). App bundle 283KB (index 223KB + minigames 60KB), under 310KB WARN.

POLISH & INTEGRATION CYCLE. T028 Integration audit: verified all 14 minigames in createMinigame() switch, OghamPanel wired (show/hide before card), EffectEngine.applyOghamEffect() called after ogham selection, processOghamModifiers() called before applyEffects(), game loop 11-step flow intact, save/load not needed (web demo ephemeral store). T029 Error resilience: added 3 try/catch guards in main.ts -- card generation with emergency fallback card (3 safe options, no damage), minigame with neutral score 50 fallback + finally block for overlay cleanup, effect application with skip fallback. T030 White scenes diagnosis: root cause identified -- MerlinGame.tscn and MerlinCabinHub.tscn use plain Node root with no background ColorRect, no background_color/modulate in scene files, MerlinCabinHub has parse error in script. Fix requires Godot editor (add CanvasLayer+ColorRect, fix parse error, set project background_color). T031 Card quality pass: all 166 templates verified -- 3 options each, no narrative under 20 or over 200 words, no duplicate verbs per card, all effects non-empty, all within caps. App bundle 284KB (+1KB), under 370KB WARN.

white_scenes_diagnosis.root_cause: Plain Node root + no background ColorRect

cycles.summary: HUMAN TESTER MODE. Full analytical playtesting (3 simulated runs), visual QA regression check, cross-cycle metrics analysis. Findings: HIGH T036 (GroqAdapter not validating LLM effect caps -- fixed: added sanitizeEffectCap() clamping HEAL<=7, DAMAGE<=5, REP<=-10/+10), MEDIUM T037 (8s LLM generation blackout -- fixed: showLLMLoadingHint() pill indicator at bottom-center). MEDIUM findings (no escalation): druides over-represented 31% in card pool, cautious player never dies. New open tasks T038 (difficulty scaling) and T039 (faction rebalance guidance). Bundle unchanged 289KB. Zero TS errors. Code review APPROVED.

WHITE SCENE FIX + DIFFICULTY SCALING + FACTION BALANCE. T001 CRITICAL RESOLVED: CanvasLayer(layer=-10)+ColorRect(#0a0a12, anchors_preset=15) added to MerlinGame.tscn, MerlinCabinHub.tscn, Menu3DPC.tscn. project.godot clear color set to Color(0.039,0.039,0.071,1). validate_step0 exit=0, zero new parse errors. T038 DONE: 3-stage progressive drain implemented in Constants.ts (LIFE_DRAIN_THRESHOLD_STAGE2=15, LIFE_DRAIN_THRESHOLD_STAGE3=25, LIFE_DRAIN_STAGE2=2, LIFE_DRAIN_STAGE3=3), drainLifeScaled() action added to Store.ts (immutable ternary lookup), main.ts game loop step 2 updated to call drainLifeScaled(). T039 DONE: card_generation_constraints.json updated with druides cap=15% (max 3/20 batch), ankou min=20% (min 4/20 batch), niamh target=25%. Proposed T040 (reduce avg heal from +4.7 to +3.5 for stage2 to become net-negative for cautious players). Bundle 289KB (unchanged, 0.0% delta). T005 fog shader elevated to priority 2 (unblocked by T001 completion).

playtester.cautious_player_risk: net positive all stages, HUD pressure visible
playtester.aggressive_player_risk: death risk after card 25 in stage 3

cycles.summary: CONTENT + UX CYCLE. landes_bruyere batch2: 20 cards appended (266 total) — anciens-heavy (78% of options), druides capped at 3/20 cards, HEAL_LIFE<=5 compliant, 3 Ogham references (Beith/Nion/Luis), moorland ancestor themes (cairn prayers, split menhir, tumulus guardian, procession, reed effigy, peat bog memories). T046 DONE: new src/ui/RunSummary.ts module — showRunSummary(reason) with 3 trigger paths (death drain, death effects, 30-card limit NEW, victory), shows full stats panel (cards played, anam, life, biome) + all 5 faction reputation bars with color coding. Old showEndScreen removed. T047 DONE: card flip CSS animation in index.html (@keyframes card-flip-in rotateY 0->90->-90->0, 0.4s) + CardOverlay.ts triggerFlipAnimation() called on every showCard(). Bundle +4KB (92.79->96.83KB app index), all gates PASS.
